title: calea tolimana
intro: Calea tolimana, also known as Mexican mint or Tomillo, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calea tolimana include relief from anxiety and stress, improved digestion, and a reduced risk of certain diseases due to its antioxidant properties. Calea tolimana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used as a natural remedy in herbal medicine.
